name: Newman CI Professional

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 12 * * *' # 09:00 BRT (UTC-3)

jobs:

  # ---------------------- TEST JOB ----------------------
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TZ: America/Sao_Paulo
    outputs:
      status: ${{ steps.run-tests.outcome }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install Newman + reporter
        run: |
          echo '{}' > package.json
          npm install newman@^6 newman-reporter-htmlextra@^1

      - name: Start ServeRest
        run: npx -y serverest@latest &

      - name: Wait for API
        run: |
          for i in {1..30}; do
            if curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/usuarios >/dev/null; then
              exit 0
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          exit 1

      - name: Prepare report folder
        run: |
          DATE=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d')
          echo "DATE=$DATE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          mkdir -p reports/$DATE

      - name: Run tests
        id: run-tests
        run: |
          npx newman run postman/TesteApiServeRest.postman_collection.json \
            -r htmlextra,json \
            --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/$DATE/index.html \
            --reporter-json-export reports/$DATE/report.json \
            --reporter-htmlextra-title "ServeRest - $DATE" \
            --reporter-htmlextra-darkTheme

      - name: Upload reports artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: newman-reports
          path: reports

  # ---------------------- DEPLOY JOB ----------------------
  deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pages: write
      id-token: write

    steps:
      - name: Download reports
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: newman-reports
          path: site

      - name: Cleanup old reports (keep last 30 days)
        run: |
          cd site
          ls -d */ | sort | head -n -30 | xargs rm -rf || true
          cd ..

      - name: Generate dashboard
        run: |
          cat << 'EOF' > site/index.html
          <html>
          <head>
          <title>API Test Dashboard</title>
          <style>
          body{font-family:Arial;background:#0f172a;color:white;text-align:center;margin:0;padding:0}
          h1{margin-top:40px}
          .grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:20px;max-width:900px;margin:auto;padding:20px}
          .card{background:#1e293b;padding:20px;border-radius:10px;transition:0.2s;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px}
          .card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);background:#334155}
          .pass{color:#22c55e}
          .fail{color:#ef4444}
          a{color:#38bdf8;text-decoration:none;font-weight:bold}
          .footer{margin-top:40px;color:#94a3b8;font-size:14px;padding-bottom:40px}
          </style>
          </head>
          <body>
          <h1>🧪 API Test Dashboard</h1>
          <div class="grid">
          EOF

                    for d in site/*/ ; do
                      DATE=$(basename $d)
                      TIME=$(TZ=America/Sao_Paulo date -r site/$DATE/index.html "+%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
                      if [ -f site/$DATE/report.json ]; then
                        FAIL_COUNT=$(jq '.run.failures | length' site/$DATE/report.json)
                        TOTAL_COUNT=$(jq '.run.stats.assertions.total' site/$DATE/report.json)
                        if [ "$FAIL_COUNT" -eq "0" ]; then
                          STATUS="✔ $TOTAL_COUNT testes"
                          COLOR="pass"
                        else
                          STATUS="❌ $FAIL_COUNT falhas / $TOTAL_COUNT testes"
                          COLOR="fail"
                        fi
                      else
                        STATUS="Relatório não encontrado"
                        COLOR="fail"
                      fi

                      echo "<div class='card'>" >> site/index.html
                      echo "<span>📅 $DATE</span>" >> site/index.html
                      echo "<span>🕒 $TIME BRT</span>" >> site/index.html
                      echo "<span class='$COLOR'>$STATUS</span>" >> site/index.html
                      echo "<a href='$DATE/'>Abrir relatório</a>" >> site/index.html
                      echo "</div>" >> site/index.html
                    done

                    cat << 'EOF' >> site/index.html
          </div>
          <div class="footer">
          Pipeline executado via GitHub Actions
          </div>
          </body>
          </html>
          EOF

      - name: Upload Pages artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: site

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
